meta.title: Serahr — Digital Solutions for Your Business
meta.description: Prototyping for software solutions. Appointment reminders, AI chatbots, and visitor counting — modern, secure, and made in Germany.

hero.headline: Digital Tools That Simplify Your Day
hero.subheadline: Automated appointment reminders, intelligent chatbots, and real-time visitor counting — modern, secure, and easy to use.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Three solutions, one goal: making your business more efficient.

remind.name: SerahrRemind
remind.description: Automatic appointment reminders via SMS and email for practices and service providers. Reduce no-shows and save valuable time.

chat.name: SerahrChat
chat.description: An intelligent chatbot that instantly answers your customers' most common questions. Easy to set up, available around the clock.

count.name: SerahrCount
count.description: Track visitor flows live at events and venues. Data-driven decisions in real time.
